programme.title: The Morning Edit
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN. Watch as we showcase hot products with special sneak peeks and lively competitions. Catch vibrant and engaging mornings with us here at TVSN!

programme.title: The Morning Edit
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN. Watch as we showcase hot products with special sneak peeks and lively competitions. Catch vibrant and engaging mornings with us here at TVSN!

programme.title: Endless Fortune Fashion
programme.desc: For women who crave more than fast fashion. New to TVSN. This range is bold, ageless and individual. Endlessly wearable forward-thinking designs within a story of its own.

programme.title: Florence Bohemia Fashion
programme.desc: Express your individuality with Florence Bohemia Fashion. Featuring flowing fabrics and artistic details. This collection brings effortless elegance and free spirited style to every occasion.

programme.title: Pilates Pro Chair
programme.desc: Low impact workout delivers results without the aches and pains from lifting weights and running on treadmills. Does this sound like you? It's time you try the Pilates Pro Chair!

programme.title: Quickpot Ultimo
programme.desc: The ultimate in effortless cooking. This versatile kitchen essential speeds up meal preparation with precision. Create delicious and perfectly cooked dishes in no time.

programme.title: 3D Printer - Bring Your Ideas to Life

programme.title: The Jocks
programme.desc: The Jocks steps inside the world of elite riders Tommy Berry and Chad Schofield--two athletes who soared to early success, only to be derailed by life-changing setbacks. Now, we follow their fight to rebuild.

programme.title: Gravitas
programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.title: Wion Pulse
programme.desc: The host shares a detailed analysis of the latest news stories from various spheres including political and socio-economic issues from across the globe.

programme.title: Gravitas

programme.title: Stolen Kisses
programme.desc: After being discharged from his military service, Antoine struggles with work as well as with love. 1968. France. Director: Francois Truffaut. Starring: Jean-Pierre Leaud, Claude Jade.

programme.title: Meet The Leroys
programme.desc: In order to quell marriage troubles, a man takes his wife and kids on a trip down memory lane. 2024. France. Director: Florent Bernard. Starring: Charlotte Gainsbourg, Jose Garcia.

programme.title: My Dying Place
programme.desc: In the tiny Canterbury settlement of Birdlings Flat, Patrick McNulty has found peace. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Loren Kett.

programme.title: Bax And Beyond
programme.desc: Explore Kylie Bax's meteoric rise to fame, with 13 international Vogue covers, she is New Zealand's first supermodel. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Neil Gussey.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Carmen Curlers
programme.desc: 1/1. Axel Byvang answers an ad from investors looking to fund an electric curler invention. 2023. Denmark. Director: Natasha Arthy. Starring: Morten Hee Andersen, Maria Rossing.

programme.title: When Fall Is Coming
programme.desc: After a mushroom related incident, a grandmother struggles under the weight of her guilt. 2024. France. Director: Francois Ozon. Starring: Helene Vincent, Josiane Balasko.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/1. Queer performance artist Gabriel and his partner Andy long to adopt a child. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young, Fra Fee.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/2. With preparations for the adoption under way, a tragic event changes this new-found family's life forever. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/3. The repercussions of a catastrophic event sends Gabe spiralling, and the adoption is put into jeopardy. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young.

programme.title: High And Low: John Galliano
programme.desc: Examine the rapid rise and fall from grace, and journey forward for controversial fashion designer John Galliano. 2023. USA. Director: Kevin Macdonald.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Bax And Beyond
programme.desc: Explore Kylie Bax's meteoric rise to fame, with 13 international Vogue covers, she is New Zealand's first supermodel. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Neil Gussey.

programme.title: Carmen Curlers
programme.desc: 1/1. Axel Byvang answers an ad from investors looking to fund an electric curler invention. 2023. Denmark. Director: Natasha Arthy. Starring: Morten Hee Andersen, Maria Rossing.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: High And Low: John Galliano
programme.desc: Examine the rapid rise and fall from grace, and journey forward for controversial fashion designer John Galliano. 2023. USA. Director: Kevin Macdonald.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Carmen Curlers
programme.desc: 1/1. Axel Byvang answers an ad from investors looking to fund an electric curler invention. 2023. Denmark. Director: Natasha Arthy. Starring: Morten Hee Andersen, Maria Rossing.

programme.title: Flavors Of Iraq
programme.desc: A French-Iraqi journalist reflects on his father's journey from Iraq to France following his passing . 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Leonard Cohen.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: The Umbrellas Of Cherbourg
programme.desc: Genevieve and Guy's romance comes to an abrupt stop when Guy is drafted into the War. 1964. France. Director: Jacques Demy. Starring: Catherine Deneuve, Nino Castelnuovo.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: The People's Joker
programme.desc: An aspiring clown grappling with her gender identity combats a fascistic caped crusader. 2022. USA. Director: Vera Drew. Starring: Vera Drew, Lynn Downey, Kane Distler.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/1. The discovery of a mass grave near Poland's border uncovers a decade long murder spree. 2022. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Julius Gause, Robert Glatzeder.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/2. Maggie believes that the truth lies in her and her childhood-friend Adrian's shared past. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Maximilian Ehrenreich, Julius Gause.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/3. Determined to find proof that her brother is still alive, Maggie crosses the border into Poland. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Dominik Schiefner, Maximilian Ehrenreich.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/4. Summer 1990 a shady man, Liliom, presents Kai with an offer to live with his 'real family'. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Maximilian Ehrenreich, Julius Gause.

programme.title: Francois Truffaut: My Life A Screenplay.
programme.desc: A partial biography of esteemed filmmaker Francois Truffaut. Sadly, terminal illness cut his story short. 2024. France. Director: David Teboul.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Flavors Of Iraq
programme.desc: A French-Iraqi journalist reflects on his father's journey from Iraq to France following his passing . 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Leonard Cohen.

programme.title: The Umbrellas Of Cherbourg
programme.desc: Genevieve and Guy's romance comes to an abrupt stop when Guy is drafted into the War. 1964. France. Director: Jacques Demy. Starring: Catherine Deneuve, Nino Castelnuovo.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: The People's Joker
programme.desc: An aspiring clown grappling with her gender identity combats a fascistic caped crusader. 2022. USA. Director: Vera Drew. Starring: Vera Drew, Lynn Downey, Kane Distler.

programme.title: The Umbrellas Of Cherbourg
programme.desc: Genevieve and Guy's romance comes to an abrupt stop when Guy is drafted into the War. 1964. France. Director: Jacques Demy. Starring: Catherine Deneuve, Nino Castelnuovo.

programme.title: Flavors Of Iraq
programme.desc: A French-Iraqi journalist reflects on his father's journey from Iraq to France following his passing . 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Leonard Cohen.

programme.title: Honey Kaha
programme.desc: A low-budget streetwise cop, Honey Kaha, takes to the streets to fight oppression and colonisation. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Te Waiarangi Ratana. Starring: Kura Turuwhenua, Bailey Poching.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Chasing The Gold
programme.desc: The gold medal in Australia's most grueling ironman competition is up for grabs, as younger competitors threaten to dethrone the reigning champion. 2025. Australia. Director: Wes Greene.

programme.title: Niki
programme.desc: Niki de Saint Phalle arrives in Paris, escaping the strain of 1950's US to find freedom in art. 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Celine Sallette. Starring: Charlotte Le Bon, John Robinson.

programme.title: Outcast Of The Islands
programme.desc: When a man is caught stealing from the trading post he is sacked, but Captain Lingard takes pity on him. 1952. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/5. Maggie's hopes for her brother actualise, Kai is alive, however, his confessions upset her. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/6. Deciding to team up and put a stop to the evil, the siblings uncover a disturbing family secret. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/7. The siblings travel to Carpathians to track down the mysterious man who took Kai. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Frida Beineix, Maximilian Ehrenreich.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/8. A fight for life and death follows, as the search for Gorski comes to a close. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: Jacques Demy: The Pink and the Black
programme.desc: The career and films of Jacques Demy, a French filmmaker specializing in poetic musicals. 2024. France. Director: Florence Platarets.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Chasing The Gold
programme.desc: The gold medal in Australia's most grueling ironman competition is up for grabs, as younger competitors threaten to dethrone the reigning champion. 2025. Australia. Director: Wes Greene.

programme.title: Honey Kaha
programme.desc: A low-budget streetwise cop, Honey Kaha, takes to the streets to fight oppression and colonisation. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Te Waiarangi Ratana. Starring: Kura Turuwhenua, Bailey Poching.

programme.title: Outcast Of The Islands
programme.desc: When a man is caught stealing from the trading post he is sacked, but Captain Lingard takes pity on him. 1952. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Niki
programme.desc: Niki de Saint Phalle arrives in Paris, escaping the strain of 1950's US to find freedom in art. 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Celine Sallette. Starring: Charlotte Le Bon, John Robinson.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Outcast Of The Islands
programme.desc: When a man is caught stealing from the trading post he is sacked, but Captain Lingard takes pity on him. 1952. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Honey Kaha
programme.desc: A low-budget streetwise cop, Honey Kaha, takes to the streets to fight oppression and colonisation. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Te Waiarangi Ratana. Starring: Kura Turuwhenua, Bailey Poching.

programme.title: Adieu Philippine
programme.desc: Michel goes on one last vacation, followed closely by Lillian and Juliette. 1962. France, Italy. Director: Jacques Rozier. Starring: Jean-Claude Aimini, Daniel Descamps.

programme.title: El Topo
programme.desc: El Topo and his son embark on a long, arduous, and 'colourful' spiritual journey into the desert. 1971. Mexico. Director: Alejandro Jodorowsky. Starring: Alejandro Jodorowsky, Brontis Jodorowsky.

programme.title: Fando Y Lis
programme.desc: Fando and his girlfirend venture through a post-apocolyptic wasteland to find the mystical city of Tar. 1968. Mexico. Director: Alejandro Jodorowsky. Starring: Tamara Garina, Sergio Kleiner.
